extortion.description: In addition to the distribution of forklifts and warehouse equipment, we offer comprehensive intralogistics solutions from a single source. As an authorized Linde dealer, we are your forklift expert in Baden-Württemberg. Schöler Fördertechnik AG has been a family-owned company for 50 years and, as a Linde authorized dealer, is responsible for the distribution of forklifts and warehouse equipment in the Baden-Württemberg area as well as the market leader in its field. schoeler-gabelstapler.de
